title: London Meetup: Connect with the npmx Community

topics.title: npmx Meetup in London
topics.summary: Plans for an @npmx.dev meetup are underway this evening in London, providing an opportunity for community engagement and networking among developers and enthusiasts.

topics.title: npmx Social Gathering
topics.summary: An npmx social event is scheduled for tonight in London, inviting participants to enjoy conversation, food, beer, and stickers, fostering a sense of community among attendees.
